title: The Insurance Act, 1938
full_text: The Insurance Act, 1938 बीमा अधिनियम, 1938 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 193804 Act Number: 04 Enactment Date: 1938-02-26 Act Year: 1938 Short Title: The Insurance Act, 1938 Hindi Title: बीमा अधिनियम, 1938 Long Title: An Act to consolidate and amend the law relating to the business of insurance.
